dashboard.integrity_complete: Key data is complete for the latest day.
dashboard.source_aligned: Today's source data and all local stages are aligned.
dashboard.score_v01: Recovery Score v0.1 infers recovery pressure from activity and training load.
dashboard.score_v02: Recovery Score v0.2 combines morning Kubios HRV, mean heart rate, readiness, and load.
dashboard.score_v10: Recovery Score v1.0 combines recovery capacity and training load against your rolling 28-day baseline.

freshness.source_data_not_available_for_today: Polar has not provided today's data yet; the importer and database are aligned with the currently available source data.
freshness.raw_import_lag: Raw import is behind the fetched source data.
freshness.daily_metrics_lag: Daily Metrics is behind the imported data.
freshness.recovery_lag: Recovery is behind the source data.
freshness.confidence_lag: Confidence is behind the source data.
freshness.local_coach_lag: Local Coach is behind the source data.

recovery.score_confidence_notice: The recovery score estimates your recovery state, while confidence reflects how strongly the available data supports that estimate.

local_coach.title: Today's Coach Guidance (Local Rules)
local_coach.local_notice: Generated by deterministic on-device rules; no cloud AI was called.
local_coach.gate_passed: The prospective data-collection gate has passed.
local_coach.progress_note: Only genuine daily records generated on time after the protocol start date count; historical backfills do not.
local_coach.collection_warning: Prospective collection has missing or delayed days. Check the daily One-Click Sync.
local_coach.missing: No Local Coach guidance is available. Run Local Coach first.
local_coach.historical: Historical guidance from {date}, {days} days ago; it does not represent your current state.
local_coach.disclaimer: This guidance is generated by deterministic on-device rules and is not medical diagnosis or treatment advice.

training_advice.normal: Proceed as planned and adjust to how you feel during the session.
training_advice.moderate_reduction: Reduce volume moderately, preserve movement quality, and avoid extra work.
training_advice.major_reduction: Reduce volume substantially and favor low-risk movements with generous rest.
training_advice.technique_only: Keep the session to light technique practice without pursuing intensity or volume.
training_advice.mobility_only: Switch to mobility, rhythm footwork, or other easy movement.
training_advice.rest: Skip this session and prioritize recovery and symptom awareness.

sleep_advice.prioritize_sleep: Consider an earlier bedtime, create more sleep opportunity, and reduce stimulation before bed.
sleep_advice.insufficient_data: Sleep data is insufficient; keep a regular schedule and allow enough sleep opportunity.
sleep_advice.maintain_schedule: Keep a regular bedtime and avoid substantially reducing sleep opportunity.

hydration_advice.consider_electrolytes: During high-load conditions, hydrate consistently; if sweating is substantial, consider electrolytes in the context of your diet.
hydration_advice.increase_fluids: Around training, monitor thirst, urine color, and sweating, and create more opportunities to drink fluids.
hydration_advice.monitor_sweat_loss: Load and environment data are limited; adjust conservatively based on thirst, sweating, and the actual session.
hydration_advice.normal_hydration: Maintain regular daily hydration and adjust to actual sweating.

local_coach.nutrition_advice: After an evening session, consider a recovery meal with carbohydrate and protein sources.

recovery_advice.normal: Maintain normal recovery habits; a high load alone does not automatically require rest.
recovery_advice.active_recovery: Use easy movement, relaxation, and adequate rest intervals, and avoid adding extra load.
recovery_advice.reduce_load: Prioritize recovery and substantially control total training load today.
recovery_advice.rest_and_monitor: Favor rest and easy movement while continuing to monitor how you feel.
recovery_advice.insufficient_data: Evidence is insufficient, so the local rules have degraded to conservative guidance.

personal_logging.title: Daily Log
personal_logging.intro: Polar records represent physiological load; manual records capture exercises, volume, and perceived effort. They are not added together by default.
personal_logging.empty: No local body, nutrition, or manual training records are available. Open Daily Log from the sidebar.
personal_logging.height: Height (cm; required for the first entry and reusable later)
personal_logging.notes: Notes (excluded from AI Context by default)
personal_logging.bmi_notice: BMI is a general height-to-weight indicator and cannot determine health or body composition on its own.
personal_logging.confirm_delete_body: Confirm deletion of this body record
personal_logging.unit: Unit (for example g, serving, or ml)
personal_logging.nutrition_notes: Nutrition Notes (excluded from AI Context by default)
personal_logging.food_saved: The nutrition entry was saved; unentered nutrient values remain NULL.
personal_logging.confirm_delete_food: Confirm deletion of this nutrition entry
personal_logging.nutrition_empty: No nutrition entries for this day.
personal_logging.save_strength: Save Strength Session and Expand Sets
personal_logging.metadata: Structured Details (JSON for technique, combinations, Freestyle, Battle, or juggling skills)
personal_logging.training_saved: The training record was saved locally.
personal_logging.training_deleted: The training session and its exercise sets were deleted.
personal_logging.training_empty: No manual training records for this day.

ai_context.manual_warning: This is a manual sync: review the export and upload it to ChatGPT yourself.
ai_context.confirm: I reviewed the preview and confirm local file creation only
ai_context.confirm_first: Confirm that you reviewed the preview first.
ai_context.written: The package was written to local exports/ai_context; nothing was uploaded automatically.
ai_context.privacy_notice: This is a manual sync: review the export and upload it to ChatGPT yourself. Uploaded data is governed by the destination service's file and chat data policies; AI analysis does not replace a doctor, dietitian, or qualified coach.
ai_context.q2: Does my nutrition support morning strength and evening Hip-Hop?
ai_context.q4: Is my 7-day weight trend consistent with my goal?
ai_context.q5: Which exercises are increasing volume too quickly?
ai_context.q6: Are sleep, HRV, and training load consistent?
ai_context.q7: Does today's carbohydrate plan support two sessions?
ai_context.q8: Is there a risk of chronically low energy intake?

sync.coach_updated: Last Sync Local Coach Records Updated: {value}

reports.title: Daily Recovery Report - {date}
reports.prospective_note: Historical records, future dates, and backfills outside the protocol window do not count.
reports.parallel_notice: Polar and manual training are shown in parallel and are not added together by default; links require manual confirmation.
reports.missing_nutrition: Unlogged nutrition values remain missing and are never estimated as zero.
reports.method: Recovery Score uses your rolling personal baseline when available and falls back to supported load, HRV, sleep, or Kubios rules when baseline data is insufficient.
reports.missing_data: No reportable data is available. Run Daily Metrics and Recovery Score first.
reports.date_missing: No recovery metrics and score were found for {date}.
reports.kubios_historical: Historical Kubios data from {days} days earlier; it may not represent this report date.
reports.kubios_advanced_link: See Kubios Advanced Metrics in the Dashboard for the complete metric set.

errors.HEIGHT_REQUIRED_FOR_FIRST_MEASUREMENT: The first body record requires height.
errors.INVALID_SET_COUNT: Set count must be greater than zero.
errors.AI_CONTEXT_SENSITIVE_QUESTION: The custom question contains sensitive information or is too long, so export was stopped.
errors.invalid_value: Check the allowed range for the entered value.

kubios_screenshot.title: Kubios Screenshot Import
kubios_screenshot.intro: Upload Kubios HRV screenshots for on-device recognition. Results are never written to health data automatically.
kubios_screenshot.local_only: Local OCR: screenshots are not uploaded and are excluded from AI Context.
kubios_screenshot.review_notice: Screenshot recognition may contain errors. Review every field before import.
kubios_screenshot.upload_help: PNG, JPG, JPEG, HEIC (when locally decodable), and WEBP are supported; multiple files may be selected.
kubios_screenshot.import_and_update: Import and update analysis for the day
kubios_screenshot.confirm_checkbox: I reviewed every field and confirm this screenshot result
kubios_screenshot.confirmation_required: Explicit user confirmation is required before any database write.
kubios_screenshot.low_confidence: Some fields have low confidence. Review or edit them manually.
kubios_screenshot.high_confidence: Recognition confidence is high, but manual confirmation is still required.
kubios_screenshot.conflict_title: Existing Kubios record found for this date
kubios_screenshot.keep_existing: Keep existing record and skip screenshot
kubios_screenshot.use_screenshot: Use screenshot as preferred source for the day
kubios_screenshot.conflict_notice: CSV and screenshots never overwrite silently. CSV is preferred unless you explicitly select the screenshot for that day.
kubios_screenshot.validation_failed: Validation failed. Correct required fields or obvious recognition errors.
kubios_screenshot.downstream_success: Daily metrics, baseline, recovery, confidence, Local Coach, and report were recalculated.
kubios_screenshot.downstream_failed: The screenshot was imported, but downstream recalculation failed. Run the local pipeline later.
kubios_screenshot.batch_summary: Batch results: recognized {recognized}, needs input {manual}, duplicate {duplicate}, failed {failed}
kubios_screenshot.group_title: Combine Two Screenshots from One Measurement
kubios_screenshot.group_notice: Only combine screenshots when you personally confirm they came from the same Kubios measurement. This does not import or overwrite health data.
kubios_screenshot.group_select: Select exactly two screenshot audit IDs
kubios_screenshot.group_confirm: I confirm both screenshots belong to the same measurement
kubios_screenshot.group_success: Measurement group created. Review and import each screenshot separately.
kubios_screenshot.measurement_group_date_mismatch: The detected dates conflict with the confirmed date.
kubios_screenshot.measurement_group_time_window_exceeded: The detected times are more than 15 minutes apart.
kubios_screenshot.delete_files: Also delete original and processed image files
kubios_screenshot.delete_formal: Also delete the confirmed Kubios formal record (use caution)
kubios_screenshot.delete_confirm: I confirm the deletion choices above
kubios_screenshot.delete_preserved: The formal Kubios record was preserved.
kubios_screenshot.ocr_unavailable: Local Vision OCR is not ready. Run scripts/build_kubios_ocr_helper.py.
kubios_screenshot.privacy_footer: OCR assists data entry only and is not a medical judgment; recognition errors are never treated as physiological abnormalities.
kubios_screenshot.template_unverified: This candidate still needs manual screenshot-type confirmation. Select the closest page.
kubios_screenshot.confirm_template: Confirm screenshot type and recognize fields
kubios_screenshot.quality_rejected: Screenshot quality check failed. Retake the screenshot or use quick manual entry.
kubios_screenshot.unexpected_aspect_ratio: Screenshot aspect ratio does not match current templates
kubios_screenshot.template_selection_required: Manual screenshot type selection is required
kubios_screenshot.accepted_high: Marked {count} high-confidence prefilled fields; final import confirmation is still required.
kubios_screenshot.clear_prefill: Clear prefilled values and enter manually
kubios_screenshot.manual_ready: Full manual entry mode is active.
kubios_screenshot.calibration_notice: Calibration changes normalized regions for this template only and requires explicit confirmation.
kubios_screenshot.save_calibration_confirm: I confirm saving this template region calibration
kubios_screenshot.supported_templates_only: Only the listed templates are currently supported. Other Kubios pages need a new template calibrated with real screenshots.

kubios_metrics.trend_only: Advanced HRV metrics are for personal trend observation only and are not medical diagnosis.
kubios_metrics.autonomic_notice: PNS and SNS indices are shown without labeling either direction as good or bad.
kubios_metrics.historical: Historical Kubios measurement from {days} days ago; it may not represent today.

common.safety: Interpret against your own repeated measurements and data quality, not as a diagnosis.

frequency.safety: LF, HF, and LF/HF are method-sensitive trend metrics and do not precisely measure sympathovagal balance.

rmssd.name: RMSSD
rmssd.description: Short-term beat-to-beat variability used for personal recovery trends.

mean_hr.name: Mean HR
mean_hr.description: Average heart rate during the measurement.

readiness.name: Readiness
readiness.safety: A low value is not evidence of disease.

pns.name: PNS Index
pns.safety: A lower value is not a diagnosis.

sns.name: SNS Index
sns.safety: A higher value is not automatically bad.

quality.name: Measurement Quality
quality.description: Quality label supplied with the measurement.
quality.safety: Quality describes the measurement, not recovery status.

stress.name: Stress Index
stress.description: Kubios-derived index for personal trend comparison.
stress.safety: It is not a medical stress diagnosis.

physiological_age.name: Physiological Age
physiological_age.description: Kubios comparison indicator, not actual biological or health age.
physiological_age.safety: Do not treat it as your true health age.

lf_hf.name: LF/HF Ratio
lf_hf.description: Ratio of LF to HF power; interpretation is method-sensitive.

mood.name: Mood
mood.safety: It is not a mental-health diagnosis.

exercise.title: Exercise
exercise.intro: Latest Polar exercise details, personal training-load baseline, and deterministic guidance.
exercise.empty: No exercise record is available yet.

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.intro: Latest available sleep structure, nightly signals, personal baseline, and deterministic guidance.
sleep.empty: No sleep record is available yet.
sleep.summary_no_data: There is not enough sleep evidence to assess recovery yet.
sleep.summary_with_score: The sleep composite score is {score}; recovery status: {status}.
sleep.ai_placeholder: AI recommendation interface reserved: future personalized guidance will use locally authorized data.
sleep.issue_bedtime_good: ✓ Bedtime is in an earlier window
sleep.issue_hrv_good: ✓ HRV is near or above baseline
sleep.score_composition_note: These local explanatory components help interpret Polar sleep evidence and do not change the original score.
sleep.trends_no_data: There is not enough history to draw a trend.
sleep.timeline_no_data: Polar did not return a complete sleep-stage sequence, so the stage timeline cannot be drawn.
sleep.today_ready: Today's sleep data is up to date.
sleep.today_pending: Polar has not returned today's sleep result. The latest available record is {date}; the system will keep checking during later syncs.
sleep.missing_notice: Fields not returned by the current Polar source remain unavailable and are never estimated as zero.

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.intro: Complete Kubios morning autonomic status with personal baselines and deterministic recovery guidance.
recovery.empty: No recovery record is available yet.
recovery.boundary: These measurements support personal trend observation. New Kubios metrics do not automatically change the Recovery Score.
recovery.detail_range_basis: Range uses only valid records with excellent or good measurement quality in the last 28 days
recovery.detail_summary_good: Usable RMSSD and resting-HR signals are broadly favorable; still combine them with subjective energy and muscle soreness.
recovery.detail_summary_normal: The main recovery signals are near your personal range without a clear one-direction deviation.
recovery.detail_summary_low: At least one core recovery signal is clearly outside your personal range; observe today and control extra load.
recovery.detail_summary_conflict: Recovery signals point in different directions, so they are not collapsed into one score.
recovery.detail_summary_building: There are fewer than 7 valid measurement days. Deviation information is shown while the personal baseline continues to build.
recovery.detail_summary_unusable: Measurement quality is insufficient or no current value is analyzable, so no deterministic recovery conclusion is generated.
recovery.detail_confidence_copy_high: Measurement quality is good and history supports directional comparison; this is not a medical diagnosis or injury prediction.
recovery.detail_confidence_copy_moderate: The result supports a limited personal trend comparison, but the baseline needs more data; this is not a medical diagnosis or injury prediction.
recovery.detail_confidence_copy_low: Data completeness or baseline maturity is limited. Use this for observation only, not a definitive training conclusion.
recovery.detail_confidence_copy_unavailable: This measurement cannot support reliable analysis. Add a valid measurement before comparing against a personal baseline.
recovery.detail_explanation_missing: The current value is missing or invalid and is excluded from statistics.
recovery.detail_explanation_baseline_insufficient: Fewer than 7 valid personal measurement days; no definitive direction is assigned.
recovery.detail_explanation_rmssd_below_range: Below your personal range; a negative recovery signal.
recovery.detail_explanation_rmssd_above_range: Above recent typical levels; combine with other signals.
recovery.detail_explanation_rmssd_extreme_high: The increase is unusually large and is not automatically interpreted as excellent recovery.
recovery.detail_explanation_rmssd_above_center: Above recent typical levels and directionally supportive.
recovery.detail_explanation_hr_above_range: Above your personal range; a signal to watch.
recovery.detail_explanation_hr_below_range: Below your personal range; lower is not automatically better.
recovery.detail_explanation_hr_extreme_low: Well below range; not automatically interpreted as excellent recovery.
recovery.detail_explanation_hr_below_center: At a relatively low recent level and directionally supportive.
recovery.detail_explanation_stress_above_range: Above recent personal levels; an auxiliary signal to watch.
recovery.detail_explanation_stress_below_range: Below recent personal levels; an auxiliary supportive signal.
recovery.detail_explanation_stress_below_center: Below recent typical levels; an auxiliary supportive signal.
recovery.detail_explanation_respiration_outside_r: Outside your personal range; both high and low values need observation.
recovery.detail_explanation_respiration_within_ra: Near your personal range and broadly stable.
recovery.detail_factor_morning_rmssd_support: RMSSD is above recent typical levels.
recovery.detail_factor_morning_mean_hr_support: Resting HR is at a relatively low recent level.
recovery.detail_factor_stress_index_support: Stress index is below recent personal levels.
recovery.detail_factor_measurement_quality_suppor: Measurement quality is excellent or good.
recovery.detail_factor_morning_rmssd_watch: RMSSD is outside your personal range.
recovery.detail_factor_morning_mean_hr_watch: Resting HR is outside your personal range.
recovery.detail_factor_stress_index_watch: Stress index is above recent personal levels.
recovery.detail_factor_respiratory_rate_watch: Respiratory rate is outside your personal range.
recovery.detail_factor_baseline_maturity_watch: The personal baseline is still building or provisional.
recovery.detail_factor_no_support: There is not enough clear supportive evidence yet.
recovery.detail_factor_no_watch: No additional deviation needs attention right now.
recovery.detail_advice_data_unavailable: This measurement is unusable. Add a valid morning measurement; do not generate a training-intensity conclusion from this record.
recovery.detail_advice_building: The baseline is still building. If subjective energy is good and muscle soreness is limited, keep the planned session and continue collecting data.
recovery.detail_advice_positive: Morning recovery signals are broadly favorable. If subjective energy is good and muscle soreness is limited, follow the planned training session.
recovery.detail_advice_normal: Morning recovery signals are near your personal range. If subjective status is stable, follow the plan and adjust to real-time feedback.
recovery.detail_advice_low: Some core recovery signals are low. If fatigue or soreness is notable, reduce extra load and prioritize recovery.
recovery.detail_advice_conflict: Recovery signals disagree. Combine them with subjective energy, muscle soreness, and training feel, and adjust conservatively if needed.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.intro: Simply record what you ate, how much, the unit, and the meal time. Local structured services handle classification and nutrition summaries.
nutrition.empty: No nutrition record is available yet.
nutrition.missing_notice: Unlogged nutrition values remain missing and are not estimated as zero.

system.title: System Information
system.intro: Local versions, data freshness, quality checks, and synchronization status.
system.local_only: System checks are read-only and local. Cloud AI remains independently approval-gated.

inline_edit.edit_recovery_hint: Enter today's post-waking RMSSD and resting heart rate. Saving retains provenance and starts synchronization.
inline_edit.recovery_saved_sync_started: Today's RMSSD and resting heart rate were saved. Polar sleep is syncing and today's metrics are updating.
inline_edit.recovery_saved_sync_failed: Recovery data was saved, but automatic sync could not start. Run a manual sync from System Information.

nutrition_entry.max_five_hint: Enter up to five items per category; blank rows are not saved. Hydration and alcohol use millilitres, regular foods use grams, and supplements use the selected unit.
nutrition_entry.no_supplements: No supplements. Select Add row to begin.
nutrition_entry.analysis_notice: Calories are estimated locally from food categories. Supplements are not converted to grams or included in calories; unlike units remain separate.

supplement_products.ingredients_calculated: {product}: Ingredients calculated from the confirmed product profile.
supplement_products.provider_blocked: Online product recognition is not enabled; the Provider Approval Gate remains active. A minimal manual profile can still be created.
supplement_products.provider_available: A product-recognition provider is approved; candidates still require user confirmation.
supplement_products.barcode_ocr_reserved: Contracts exist for barcode scanning, product-front capture, and facts-label OCR. Recognizers are not enabled and results are never silently adopted.
supplement_products.medication_boundary: This is a medication record. It does not enter supplement ingredient lookup and no medication dose-adjustment advice is generated.

simple_nutrition.template_name_required: Enter a template name before saving.
simple_nutrition.copied: Meal copied as a new record.
simple_nutrition.no_copy_source: No meal record is available to copy.
simple_nutrition.time_warning: The current time differs substantially from the common time for this meal. Confirm the meal type is correct.
simple_nutrition.delete_confirm: I confirm soft deletion of the selected meal

training_baseline.title: Training Load & Habits
training_baseline.sync_error_notice: The last successful data is being retained.
training_baseline.no_training_notice: Excluded from typical training-day deviation comparison.
training_baseline.range_pending: A typical range will appear as valid training days accumulate
training_baseline.relative_week: Relative to typical weekly load: {percent}% (typical weekly median {value} kcal)
training_baseline.progress_next: {count} more valid training days to the next phase
training_baseline.calorie_note: Training calories are already included in Polar daily total calories and are not added again.

training_logging.title: Training Details
training_logging.readonly_notice: Duration, heart rate, calories, distance, and training time come from Polar. They are read-only and are never overwritten by manual data.
training_logging.manual_notice: This manual-only session has no Polar objective data; training time and basic session information may be entered.
training_logging.today_no_data: No Polar training data has been synced for today.
training_logging.no_history_exercise: No historical exercise is available to copy
training_logging.delete_confirm: I confirm soft deletion of this training
training_logging.empty_sets: This exercise has no sets. Cardio exercises may be saved without sets.
training_logging.empty_exercises: No exercise has been added yet.
training_logging.hidden_fields_preserved: Changing modes only changes visible fields; existing advanced values remain intact and RPE/RIR are never converted.
training_logging.incompatible_fields_preserved: The measurement mode changed. Existing incompatible values remain preserved; review the visible fields before saving.
training_logging.confirm_delete_set: I confirm deletion of the selected set
training_logging.confirm_delete_exercise: I confirm deletion of this exercise
training_logging.proficiency_notice: A subjective field for dance, technique, and rehabilitation; it does not alter training-load or recovery algorithms.

personal_info.title: Personal Information
personal_info.intro: Store basic information, body status, and personal targets locally. Age is calculated automatically from date of birth.
personal_info.name: Name
personal_info.weight_trend_title: Weight Change Over the Last 28 Days
personal_info.weight_trend_insufficient: At least two weight records in the last 28 days are required to display a trend.
personal_info.invalid_profile: Check name, gender, date of birth, and height.
personal_info.invalid_body: Check weight, body fat, and waist.
personal_info.save_profile_first: Save personal information with height first.
personal_info.local_notice: Personal information, body data, and targets remain on this device.

manual_logging.supplement_notice: Manual records supplement missing information. When Polar provides an overlapping metric, the Polar value takes priority.
manual_logging.activity_override_notice: Exercise type may be used to correct a generic Polar classification.
manual_logging.delete_confirm: I confirm deletion of the selected record
manual_logging.no_link: Do not link a Polar session

activity.title: Add Exercise Data Manually
activity.name: Training name
activity.confirmed_type: Confirm this type as a correction to a generic device category

recovery.title: Subjective Recovery Record
recovery.safety: Pain entries are for personal tracking only. They never generate a diagnosis or change the Recovery or Confidence Score.

scheduler_ui.title: Daily Scheduled Sync
scheduler_ui.saved: Scheduled sync settings were saved and the LaunchAgent was reloaded.
scheduler_ui.missing_today: No successful data sync has been recorded today.
scheduler_ui.deferred: Today's catch-up prompt has been deferred.
scheduler_ui.config_fallback: The scheduler configuration is missing or damaged. A read-only 06:00 fallback is active and the original file was not overwritten.
scheduler_ui.sleep_caveat: If the Mac is off, asleep, or logged out at the scheduled time, the run may be delayed or missed. The app only offers catch-up; page refreshes never start it automatically.

safety.medical: This app provides general health and training decision support and is not medical diagnosis or treatment advice.
